home.heroBody: Antminer, Whatsminer, Avalon — we are official suppliers. Delivery from China in 10–14 days. Fixed price at the time of order.
home.calcBody: Calculate your miner's payback. We factor in the current rate and network difficulty.
home.testimonial1Text: Ordered an Antminer S21 Pro, delivered in 12 days. The price was lower than competitors, and the warranty is real. All the equipment was tested in front of me before shipping. I recommend it to every serious miner.
home.testimonial2Text: Brought in two Whatsminer M60S units for repair — both were restored in a day. The technicians know their craft, the parts are genuine, and they gave a warranty on the work. This is already my third time here.
home.testimonial3Text: I placed 8 machines in the mining hotel. The rate is fair, monitoring is 24/7, and every month I get a detailed report with payouts. Peace of mind for the equipment is priceless.
home.testimonial4Text: Firmware tuned to our rate added +11% to profit. The manager explained every parameter and configured it remotely. Communication was fast and no questions were left.
home.service1Desc: Full fault diagnostics, repair of hashboards and power supplies within 24 hours.
home.service1Back: We'll restore your miner in the shortest time. In-house workshop, genuine parts, warranty on the work.
home.service2Desc: Firmware updates, pool setup, overclocking tuned to your electricity rate.
home.service2Back: We maximize your equipment's profitability. Individually selected mode for your rate and conditions.
home.service3Desc: Equipment hosting at an industrial site. Rate from $0.07/kWh, 24/7 monitoring.
home.service3Back: An industrial site with reliable power and cooling. Your equipment under round-the-clock security.

services.metaDescription: ASIC miner repair and diagnostics, firmware, configuration and mining hotel.
services.heroBody: Full-cycle ASIC miner servicing — from repair to hosting at an industrial site.
services.service1Short: Restoring faulty miners of any complexity
services.service1Desc: Our own certified workshop in Dnipro and Kyiv. Genuine parts in stock — no waiting on supply. 3-month warranty on completed work.
services.service1Item1: Full diagnostics of hashboards, PSU and control board
services.service1Item2: ASIC chip replacement: BM1370, BM1368, BM1366, BM1362
services.service1Item3: Repair and replacement of power supplies
services.service1Item4: Fixing short circuits and overheating damage
services.service1Item5: Cleaning, thermal paste application, fan replacement
services.service1Item6: Stress test under load for 24+ h with a report
services.service2Short: Maximum profitability tuned to your electricity rate
services.service2Desc: Individually tailored operating mode for your rate and cooling conditions. We support Antminer, Whatsminer, Avalon and other platforms.
services.service2Item1: Updating official firmware to the latest version
services.service2Item2: Installing custom OS: Braiins OS+, VNish, LuxOS
services.service2Item3: Mining pool, worker and backup pool configuration
services.service2Item4: Overclocking and selecting the optimal hashrate/power profile
services.service2Item5: Auto-tuning setup for the temperature range
services.service2Item6: Connecting monitoring, alerts and a Telegram bot
services.service3Short: Industrial site with a rate from $0.07/kWh
services.service3Desc: A dedicated site with industrial 380V power, powerful cooling and round-the-clock security. You get a monthly report and access to online monitoring.
services.service3Item3: Powerful ventilation and air conditioning — temperature up to +25°C
services.service3Item5: Round-the-clock technical monitoring, reboot on request
services.service3Item6: Detailed monthly report on consumption and hashrate
services.faq1A: Free when you order a repair. If you decline the repair — $10. We provide a written conclusion.
services.faq2Q: What warranty do I get after a repair?
services.faq2A: 3 months on the completed work. Replaced components carry the manufacturer's warranty. If the fault recurs — we fix it free of charge.
services.faq3Q: How do I submit a device for repair?
services.faq3A: Drop-off in Kyiv or Dnipro. We also accept shipments via Nova Poshta — we pack and return it at our expense.
services.faq4Q: What are the minimum requirements for the mining hotel?
services.faq4A: From 1 device. We sign a contract and provide access to online monitoring and a monthly report.
services.faq5Q: Can custom firmware be installed on any miner?
services.faq5A: Braiins OS+ and VNish support most Antminer models. For Whatsminer — LuxOS. Check compatibility for your model.
services.faq6Q: How long do firmware and configuration take?
services.faq6A: Usually 1–4 hours. Remotely — if the miner is connected to the network. On-site or at the service center — by arrangement.
services.faq7Q: What power supply does the mining hotel have?
services.faq7A: Industrial 380V / 50Hz grid with a dedicated transformer. UPS on critical infrastructure, automatic switchover.
services.faq8Q: Can I visit the mining hotel in person?
services.faq8A: Yes, by prior arrangement. We give a tour and show the hosting conditions for your equipment.
services.ctaBody: Get in touch for a consultation or to submit a device for service.

about.metaDescription: Trade M — official ASIC miner supplier. Antminer, Whatsminer, full service.
about.heroBody: We are a team of mining specialists who grew out of our own experience running farms. Trade M was founded with a single goal: to make industrial mining accessible and transparent.
about.value1Desc: Direct contracts with manufacturers. Only genuine equipment with a warranty.
about.value2Desc: Delivery from China in 10–14 days. Fixed price for the entire delivery period.
about.value3Desc: Repair, firmware, configuration and hosting — all under one roof.
about.value4Desc: We work under an official sole-proprietor contract: warranty, reporting, no hidden fees.

asicHub.modelsCount: {count} models in stock and on order
asicHub.sha256Title: ASIC for Bitcoin mining (SHA-256) — buy | Trade M
asicHub.sha256Description: Catalog of SHA-256 ASIC miners for Bitcoin mining: Antminer S21, S23, S19 and more. Current prices, delivery across Ukraine, service and mining hotel.
asicHub.sha256Intro: SHA-256 is the algorithm of the Bitcoin network. Here you'll find ASIC miners for mining BTC: from compact models to industrial hydro rigs. Compare hashrate, power and profitability or calculate payback in the calculator.
asicHub.scryptTitle: ASIC for Litecoin and Dogecoin mining (Scrypt) — buy | Trade M
asicHub.scryptDescription: Catalog of Scrypt ASIC miners for Litecoin and Dogecoin mining: Antminer L7, L9, L11, ElphaPex DG and more. Current prices, delivery across Ukraine, service and mining hotel.
asicHub.scryptIntro: Scrypt is the algorithm of the Litecoin and Dogecoin networks: miners produce LTC and DOGE simultaneously (merged mining). Here you'll find Scrypt ASICs — compare hashrate (GH/s), power and profitability or calculate payback in the calculator.
asicHub.kaspaTitle: ASIC for Kaspa mining (KHeavyHash) — buy | Trade M
asicHub.kaspaDescription: Catalog of KHeavyHash ASIC miners for Kaspa (KAS) mining: Antminer KS7 and more. Current prices, delivery across Ukraine, service and mining hotel.
asicHub.kaspaIntro: KHeavyHash is the algorithm of the Kaspa (KAS) network, one of the fastest blockchain networks. Here you'll find ASIC miners for mining Kaspa. Compare hashrate (TH/s), power and profitability or calculate payback in the calculator.

howItWorks.heading: How We Work
howItWorks.step1Desc: We pick a model to match your rate, budget and mining goal.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We agree on the configuration and lock the price in USDT.
howItWorks.step3Desc: USDT, cash or bank transfer — convenient and secure.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Shipping in 10–14 days, testing and a 6-month warranty.
